resources.string: Missing Controller Status
The HydroGuide controller has not sent a status update in over five seconds, indicating a problem with the connection or the hardware. The procedure is suspended until this problem is resolved.

• Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet 
	• Check that the controller is charged 
	• Replace the connecting cable to the controller
	• Connect and continue the procedure using a backup controller

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
ControllerStsTmt
ECG Data Missing
The HydroGuide controller has not sent an ECG Data packet in half a second, indicating a problem with the connection or the hardware. The procedure is suspended until this problem is resolved.

• Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet 
	• Check that the controller is charged 
	• Replace the connecting cable to the controller
	• Connect and continue the procedure using a backup controller

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
EcgDataTmt
Charger Status Fault
The HydroGuide controller has experienced an error in its battery subsystem. For safety, the procedure is suspended until this problem is resolved.
\t\u2022 Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet \n\t\u2022 Ensure the controller is charged \n\t\u2022 Connect and continue the procedure using a backup controller

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
BatterySubsFault
Intravascular Lead Off
The HydroGuide controller indicates that the intravascular lead has an error or is disconnected.

\t\u2022 Check the aligator clip at the entrance of the catheter and reposition it if necessary\n\t\u2022 Ensure the wire connecting the HydroGuide controller to the catheter line is not damaged or frayed and replace if necessary\n\t\u2022 Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
IntravLeadOff
External Lead Off
The HydroGuide controller indicates that at least one of the three external leads has an error or is disconnected.

\t\u2022 Check the connection points of all three leads and reposition each if necessary\n\t\u2022 Ensure the wires connecting the HydroGuide controller to the ECG leads are not damaged or frayed and replace if necessary\n\t\u2022 Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
ExterLeadOff
Fuel Gauge Status Flag
The HydroGuide controller indicates that there is a present problem with the fuel gauge status.
\t\u2022 Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet \n\t\u2022 Ensure the controller is charged \n\t\u2022 Connect and continue the procedure using a backup controller

Note: You may proceed with the procedure without the HydroGuide application and use pre-existing captures in your report by continuing to the report screen. Do not continue the procedure after breaching the sterile field.
FuelGaugeStatus
ECG Voltage Supply Out of Range
The HydroGUIDE controller has detected that the ECG ADC voltage supply is outside the acceptable operating range. ECG signal data may be unreliable or inaccurate.
\t\u2022 Restart the HydroGUIDE controller and confirm the alert is cleared \n\t\u2022 If the alert persists after a restart, replace the controller and ensure that the issue is resolved.
ECG measurements obtained while this alert is active may be inaccurate.
ECGADCVoltOutRange
Internal Error
An unexpected alert condition has occurred. The procedure may be suspended until this is resolved.
\t\u2022 Disconnect and reconnect the HydroGuide controller from the tablet\n\t\u2022 If the issue persists, contact technical support
Note: If this alert does not resolve, you may proceed without the HydroGuide application by continuing to the report screen.
UnknownAlert
